library_preparation_preflight.summary: Mockito Scala pulls its required runtime dependencies transitively, and no Docker service is involved, but meaningful native-image coverage of mocking needs Mockito's proxy mock maker test resource rather than the default inline mock maker.
library_preparation_preflight.agent_guidance: Add a test resource at src/test/resources/mockito-extensions/org.mockito.plugins.MockMaker containing exactly org.mockito.internal.creation.proxy.ProxyMockMaker. Keep coverage interface-based, because ProxyMockMaker uses JDK proxies and supports interfaces only; avoid class/final-class mocking and inline mock-maker assumptions in native-image tests.
risks: The core artifact is Scala-first; Java tests can exercise parts of the API but Scala macro/TypeTag-heavy APIs may be awkward without Scala test source support.
Using Mockito's default inline mock maker or mocking concrete classes is likely to fail or be unsupported under Native Image.
